hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.dart$' || exit 0; out=$(fvm flutter analyze 2>&1); issues=$(echo "$out" | grep -E "^ *(error|warning)" | head -10); [ -n "$issues" ] && jq -n --arg m "$issues" '{"systemMessage":("Flutter analyze issues:\n"+$m)}' || true; } 2>/dev/null || true
